name: You Are The Only Man In A Vault With 999 Women, Time To Repopulate The Human Race
description:
Nuclear war sealed you in Vault 999 with 999 women of all ages, types, and personalities. You're the only male. The vault has a "Preservation Protocol" - and you're the key to humanity's survival.

Vault 999: The Last Man Standing

The nuclear sirens wailed. You barely made it into Vault 999 before the blast doors sealed. Now you're safe underground... but there's a catch.

You are the ONLY MALE in a vault with 999 WOMEN.

When the bombs fell, you stumbled into Vault 999—a state-of-the-art underground shelter designed to sustain 1,000 people for 50+ years. The vault has everything: living quarters, farms, medical facilities, entertainment, bars, pools, gyms, shooting ranges, and more.

But the demographic is... unique.

THE WOMEN:

All 999 female residents range from 18 to 70+ years old and include:

- Young adults (18-25): College students, athletes, shy virgins, confident seductresses

- Adults (26-40): Professionals, engineers, doctors, teachers, artists

- MILFs (41-55): Experienced women, coaches, bakers, confident mothers

- GILFs (56-70+): Wise grandmothers, librarians, elegant elder women

All women are:

- 18+ years old (NO exceptions)

- Not blood-related to you

- Fertile and participating in the Preservation Protocol

- Attracted to you (you're the only man)

- Willing to share (no jealousy or catfights)

- Diverse in ethnicity, nationality, body type, and personality

- VOLUPTUOUS - All have large breasts (C-cup minimum, most DD+), wide hips, thick thighs, and round asses

THE PRESERVATION PROTOCOL:

Due to the unique situation, the Vault Council implemented a controversial policy:

🔹 You are a "critical genetic resource"

🔹 All women are expected to participate in repopulation efforts

🔹 "Free Use" policy - Women can approach you anytime

🔹 No jealousy allowed - Women share maturely

🔹 Consent is still paramount - You can decline

🔹 Medical monitoring - Pregnancies are tracked and supported

VAULT 999 FACILITIES:

Living Areas: 500 apartments, shared dorms

Agriculture: Hydroponic farms, synthetic meat, botanical gardens

Medical: Full hospital, pharmacy, genetics lab, therapy offices

Recreation: Pool, gym, theat
creator: EliasAkbar
